headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “Alright who’s coming with me mannn?!!"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.

headlines.h: BREAKING: “Soon, he will have it all...”
headlines.b: Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-05-07)
